---
applyTo: "**/*.py"
---
# Project coding standards for Python
- Follow the PEP 8 style guide for Python.
- Always prioritize readability and clarity.
- Write clear and concise docstring for each function and class following the Google convention. See [Google Python Style Guide](https://google.github.io/styleguide/pyguide.html).
- Ensure functions have descriptive names and include type hints.
- Maintain proper indentation (use 4 spaces for each level of indentation).
- Avoid using classes unless necessary; prefer functions for modularity.
- Write clear and comments for complex logic.
- Use type hints for function signatures and variable declarations.
